name: Beez
description:
Beez The Bee, full name Beez Wallace Sr., is one of the 42 playable Toons in Dandy's World. He was introduced on June 6, 2025, alongside Bumby, Sandy, and Ant. He is one of the 9 playable Main Characters and can be purchased in Dandy's Store.

name: Eliot
